title: CSMP Pack
description:
This is the resource pack for CSMP
if you're not part of Chaos SMP you uh, don't need this
body:
# This is a resource pack made by Eym for the members of Chaos SMP

This is the resource pack for the server, Chaos SMP.
This resource adds several CIT textures that you may have seen during lore or in the videos (assuming you're part of the server and have watched them)

This pack is meant specifically for use within CSMP


If you're not a member of Chaos SMP, you don't really have to worry about this.

If you are a member of Chaos SMP, you should have this, it's cannon



**THIS RESOURCE PACK REQUIRES A CIT MOD AND IS MADE WITH THE OPTIFINE CIT FORMAT**
Mods such as CIT Resewn or Optifine 




(CIT stands for custom item texture, it's what lets you name an item to change the texture)
